---
title: "One Day, A Computer Will Fit On A Desk (1974)"
description: "What would our kids have 20-30 years from now?"
author: "synesis"
date: "2022-08-04"
categories: [history, future, video, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![One day, a computer will fit on a desk (1974). Image from [RetroFocus](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sTdWQAKzESA).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

What would our kids have 20-30 years from now?


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_one-day-a-computer-will-fit-on-a-desk-1974-activity-6961059499067531264-0ve4).*
